content.p: An agreement to arbitrate a matter to which this subchapter applies is enforceable pursuant to section 4 of title 9, and no action brought to enforce such an agreement shall be dismissed nor shall relief therein be denied on the grounds that it is against the United States or that the United States is an indispensable party.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section 576 of former Title 5, Executive Departments and Government Officers and Employees, was transferred to section 2260 of Title 7, Agriculture, and subsequently repealed by Pub. L. 107–171, title X, § 10418(a)(3), May 13, 2002, 116 Stat. 507.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 576 was renumbered section 596 of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1992—Pub. L. 102–354 renumbered section 586 of this title as this section.
